mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(o.real_total_amount), 0) as "totalSales", COUNT(DISTINCT rv.reservation_id) as "totalCount" FROM place pl JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} AND o.status != 'CANCELED'

SELECT TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as "salesDate", SUM(o.real_total_amount) as "dailySales" FROM place pl JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} AND o.status != 'CANCELED' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY "salesDate" ASC

SELECT r.room_name as "roomName", SUM(o.real_total_amount) as "roomSales" FROM place pl JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month} AND o.status != 'CANCELED' GROUP BY r.room_name ORDER BY "roomSales" DESC
